{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Rhalia's Gate
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Rhalia's Gate]] drifts beside [[Alin]] and prefers to open only once a day due to the nature of [[Elysia]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10">''City of Light'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
